digest.greeting: Friday, July 3, Jean. Today is lighter on meetings, with CoE Sync at 11:00 AM, protected time at noon, and the Executive Project Status Slide Update at 3:00 PM. Outlook and GitHub point to 1 urgent carried-over Amazon Connect item, 2 active reminders, and a repeated dashboard deploy failure that could affect confidence in today's publish path. Keep the day centered on closing the Amazon Connect delay response with Tiago, scheduling portfolio-owner meetings, setting up the SMS Automation marketing-number call for early next week, and using the 3:00 PM deck session to make the executive update clean before the long weekend. Teams is partially rate-limited this morning, so Teams is used only where unread-chat metadata was visible.

items.label: Close the Amazon Connect delay response
items.detail: This is still the main unresolved item from yesterday's daily digest. Use today's reminder to follow up with Tiago on the Amazon Connect delay response and confirm whether Danny and Jeff have the decision-ready summary they need.

items.label: Schedule meetings with portfolio owners
items.detail: One-shot reminder added overnight. Use the lighter Friday calendar to get the portfolio-owner conversations on the books before Monday's EOW/intake rhythm takes over.

items.label: Follow up with Tiago on Amazon Connect
items.detail: One-shot reminder added overnight. Tie the follow-up directly to the open delay-response work so the Amazon Connect narrative does not sit unresolved over the weekend.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times are shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day has useful open space before 11:00 AM and again between the noon block and the 3:00 PM deck update.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Mar scheduled this with Jean and David. Use it as the best live coordination slot for CoE items that should not wait until Monday.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Best focus window for the portfolio-owner scheduling reminder, the Amazon Connect follow-up, and any quick cleanup from the CoE sync.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Weekly deck update for executive projects. The invite points to the Executive Project Status Weekly Update deck; use the session to make sure the Amazon Connect, SMS Automation, and intake/process updates are ready for leadership consumption.

items.label: Check the repeated dashboard Pages deploy failures
items.detail: Several GitHub notifications this morning show pmdashboard Pages deploy jobs failing on main. Confirm whether the pending-digest publisher still completes and whether the public dashboard is current after today's run.

items.label: Set up the SMS marketing-number call
items.detail: Deepak replied that Josh is out until July 9 but the team does not need to wait. Laura should set an early-next-week call with Anu and Tim for historical context, which keeps the SMS Automation marketing-number path moving.

items.label: Make the executive project deck weekend-ready
items.detail: Use the 3:00 PM slide update to tighten the weekly executive project story around Amazon Connect, SMS Automation, and any intake/process changes that leadership may ask about Monday.

items.label: Review Tomas Aparicio's SOP edit-access request
items.detail: SharePoint sent an action-required request for Tomas to edit "SOP Notify CL Bio Appt - Copy" in the Client Services Department library. Approve only if he should be able to make changes, share, and download that SOP copy.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Start Monday by clearing timecards and setting the week before the meeting day picks up.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected Monday focus window for any portfolio-owner scheduling or executive-deck cleanup that does not close today.

items.label: Canceled: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Sara's note says the TLs are now meeting separately and intake questions should move to the Friday EOW check-in, 1:1s, or ad hoc meetings.
